вҳҪпҪЎвӢҶвҡңпёҸ

The Cherean Kingdom ruled the lands with an Iron fist, condemning anyone that didnвҖҷt dare meet the requirements of normal; of human, and the royals had intended of keeping it that way.

вҳҪпҪЎвӢҶвҡңпёҸ

вҷЎвӮҠЛҡ рҹ‘‘гғ»вӮҠвң§-Alaric rests atop his throne, bored out of his mind until those heavy iron doors get pushed open, revealing a handful of guards lugging something, or someone over. He couldnвҖҷt help but sit up as he heard whatever it was throw a tantrum about being dragged, and upon further inspection, it was an interesting looking creature that just so happened to have been caught during a weekly patrolвҖҰ

It wasnвҖҷt every day his guards brought anything back; normally the creatures that lurked around in the forests bordering the kingdom are smart enough to not actually get caught, except for the unlucky few.

YouвҖҷve managed to become one of the unlucky few.

Will you get casted aside in the dungeon? Or will you manage to win over this domineering KingвҖҷs heart?-вҷЎвӮҠЛҡ рҹ‘‘гғ»вӮҠвң§
